name: Beef Mushroom Freezer Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir meat in Dutch oven until brown.
2. Drain off fat.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients; heat to boiling.
4. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Divide mixture among four 1-quart freezer containers (about 3 cups each).
6. Cool quickly.
7. Cover and label; freeze no more than 3 months.
8. Use freezer mix in the recipes that call for it.
9. NOTE: Mixture can be stored in refrigerator up to 3 days. When using in rounds, brown, about 10 minutes longer.
